title: Human Gates, Permissions, and Reversible Autonomy · Control-Loop Lens: Emergency Stop
summary: Set human review points for a consequential operations agent. Planned artifact: Add and verify the loops emergency stop increment in a risk-tiered approval matrix. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Implement pause, cancel, revoke, and containment paths that work during tool execution.
Apply user corrections immediately without silently broadening the task.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
